message:
fix: resolve rig-prefixed beads in gt show and gt sling (GH#2126)

gt bead show and gt sling failed with 'bead not found' for rig-prefixed
beads because inherited BEADS_DIR from the parent process overrode
working-directory-based database discovery, causing bd to query the
town-level hq database instead of the rig's database.

Changes:
- Add StripBeadsDir() to bdCmd for removing inherited BEADS_DIR
- Fix execBdShow to resolve rig directory before exec'ing bd show
- Strip BEADS_DIR in verifyBeadExists, getBeadInfo, storeFieldsInBead
- Fix runBeadMove to use BdCmd with proper routing instead of raw exec
